title: Representation of a 2D Array in Memory
description: A visual explanation of how a 2x3 multidimensional array is stored in contiguous computer memory using row-major order.
elements: Contiguous Memory Blocks labeled M0 through M5
Calculation Formula: Address = Base + (i * n + j) * size
relationships: The 2D Array Grid elements map sequentially to the Contiguous Memory Blocks
The Calculation Formula shows the mathematical relationship between an array index and its memory address
